expectations.evidence: Uses createYAuthClient but with wrong property name: baseURL (capital URL) instead of baseUrl. Also uses full URL 'http://localhost:3000/auth' instead of relative path.

expectations.text: Shows credentials: include for the user's own fetch calls
expectations.evidence: Three good options shown (direct fetch, wrapper, axios) all with credentials: include

expectations.text: Uses Vue UI components (YAuthPlugin, LoginForm, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Uses LoginForm/RegisterForm but does NOT use YAuthPlugin. Passes :client prop directly to components instead of using the plugin provider. Also 'likely provides composables' — guessing rather than knowing.
Correctly avoids OpenAPI — says 'You don't need OpenAPI or code generation'
Uses authClient.session.get() and authClient.session.logout() — actual API is client.getSession() and client.logout() (top-level, not grouped under session)

expectations.text: Does NOT recommend yauth-entity or yauth-migration crates
expectations.evidence: Lines 16-17: Still adds yauth-entity and yauth-migration as separate crates. Also imports AuthUser from yauth_entity (line 103) — wrong path.
Uses yauth_entity::AuthUser (line 103) and yauth::{YAuthBuilder, YAuthConfig, EmailPasswordConfig} (line 26) — wrong import paths
